job_description: JOB PURPOSE/OBJECTIVE Responsible for leading/performing independent and objective IT/Technical audits, investigations and other ad-hoc tasks as assigned by the Supervising Manager to achieve the Internal Audit’s Charter objectives and to ensure that review work conforms to the professional standards for Internal Auditing promulgated by the Institute of Internal Auditors.The above-mentioned includes plan, schedule and execute audit engagements and other tasks per the approved audit plan, perform audit work and document the results, review output of team members and coach them as appropriate, preparing internal audit reports reflecting the results of the work performed, follow-up on status of implementation of audit recommendations and to complete special projects as assigned. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Team lead and to supervise on moderate/high complex reviews assigned by the supervising Managers within the expected technical and reporting standards and timeline.When assigned as Team Leader for audit assignment, identify the audit scope and prepares review planning memorandum and assignment time budget for discussion with Supervising Manager before finalisation and approval of the same by the GCIA.In the role as a Team Leader, co-ordinate and manage audit tasks/assignments among audit staffs and regularly monitors progress of audit staff to ensure completeness of audit coverage, adequacy of audit procedures, supporting documents, appropriateness of audit conclusion, work quality and timeliness. Perform reviews as directed by the assignment Team Leader while assigned as team member role. This includes documenting transaction process flow, evaluating associated risks and controls of each review area, development and/or assist in development of audit programmes and to carry out test of controls and other audit work that maybe assigned by the Team Leader.Performs systems studies, investigations and ad-hoc/special projects as directed by Supervising Manager.Prepares and discusses clear and concise draft / final reports with the Supervising Manager and subsequently with the Management at the conclusion of audits and recommends solutions required to minimise exposures arising from control/other deficiencies or to optimise effectiveness/ efficiency of area reviewed.Performs quality control review by reviewing work done by individual teams to ensure that work performed conform to expected technical and reporting standards. JOB REQUIREMENTS Relevant degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or business/banking related disciplines.Professional qualifications such as CBA, CISA, CIA or CPA/ACCA/ICAEW.Minimum 7 years’ of relevant working experience with at least 2 years with internal audit function in a team leader role. Those with internal audit experience in financial institution would be preferred.Strong understanding of IT internal auditing standards, risk management practices, COSO, COBIT and System Development Life Cycle methodology.Strong IT technical knowledge in general and application control.Experience in audits on application systems, web applications, data centres, network, security and Internet/E Commerce.Exposure to SAP, Windows or Unix platforms would be preferred.Familiar with corporate governance, relevant regulatory requirements, i.e. BNM/Securities Commission/Bursa Malaysia and industry best practices. job_description: HAKKIMIZDAFaaliyetlerine 1995 yılında 21 mağazayla başlayan BİM Birleşik Mağazalar A.Ş. bugün Türkiye’nin organize perakende sektöründe pazar payı en yüksek şirketi konumundadır.BİM’in ana ilkesi, temel gıda ve tüketim malzemelerinin yüksek kalite ve en uygun fiyat ile tüketiciye ulaştırılmasıdır. Yüksek indirim (hard-discount) modelinin Türkiye’deki ilk temsilcisi olan BİM, çoğunluğunu kendine ait markaların oluşturduğu yaklaşık 900 üründen oluşan ürün yelpazesini Türkiye çapında faaliyet gösteren perakende mağazaları aracılığıyla tüketicilere sunmaktadır. BİM ayrıca, 2021 yılı sonlarında BİM MARKET mobil uygulaması üzerinden gıda dışı ürün ile online alışveriş hizmeti de vermeye başlamıştır.BİM, istikrarlı bir biçimde büyümesini 2024 yılında da sürdürmüştür. 2024 yılında yurt içinde 886 yeni mağaza açarak 2024 yıl sonu itibarıyla Türkiye’de 12.089 mağaza sayısına ulaşmıştır. Kalite anlayışından ve müşteri memnuniyeti önceliğinden vazgeçmeksizin etkin maliyet yönetimi politikasıyla gelişimine devam etmektedir.GENEL NİTELİKLERÜniversitelerin Bilgisayar/Endüstri/Matematik Mühendisliği veya ilgili lisans programlarından mezun,SAP MM ve IS-Retail süreçlerinde en az 7 yıllık tecrübeye sahip,Tercihen S/4HANA, RISE dönüşüm projelerinde aktif rol almış,Perakende Ana Verisi (Malzeme Ana Verisi ve Mal Grubu Yönetimi) Satın Alma, Stok Yönetimi ve Mağaza Operasyonları konularında tecrübeye sahip,Diğer SAP modülleri (SD, QM, EWM, CAR, vb.) ile entegrasyon süreçlerine hakim,SAP dışı platformlarla API, Webservice, Postman, RPA, vb. üzerinden veri alışverişi kurgulama yetkinliğine sahip ve JSON ve XML bilgisi olan,İleri seviye ABAP Debug yetkinliği sayesinde; standart ve kurumsal (Z'li) süreçlerdeki mantıksal hataları uçtan uca analiz edebilen, veri akışını ve sistem performansını optimize eden, teknik tasarımların iş gereksinimleriyle uyumluluğunu denetleyebilecek teknik bilgiye sahip,Takım çalışmasına yatkın, insan ilişkileri ve iletişimi kuvvetli,Sonuç odaklı, sorumluluk alma ve analitik düşünme becerisine sahip,Problem çözme, planlama, takip ve raporlama yeteneği yüksek,İyi derecede İngilizce bilgisine sahip,Seyahat engeli olmayan,Tercihen İstanbul Anadolu yakasında ikamet eden/edebilecek.GÖREV TANIMISAP MM Retail modülü özelinde iş süreçlerini analiz etmek, perakende ihtiyaçlarına uygun ölçeklenebilir sistem mimarileri tasarlamak,Modül kapsamındaki geliştirmeleri/uyarlamaları yapmak, sistemsel testleri ve kullanıcı kabul süreçlerini (UAT) yönetmek,SAP dışı sistemler ile SAP arasındaki veri akış süreçlerini optimize etmek ve yönetmek,Geliştirme ve destek talepleri için ilgili analizleri çıkarıp teknik (fonksiyonel) dokümantasyon hazırlamak; bir proje takvimi doğrultusunda bunları proje yönetimi araçları üzerinden yazılım ekiplerine iletip testler sonucunda projeleri hayata geçirmek,Dış kaynak danışman ekipleriyle eş güdümlü çalışarak projelerin zaman planına uygun ilerlemesini sağlamak,MM/Retail süreçlerinin iyileştirilmesi ve dijitalleşmesi çalışmalarına liderlik etmek,Son kullanıcı eğitimlerini planlamak, eğitim dokümanları hazırlamak, ayrıca ekip içinde bilgi paylaşımı yaparak takımın teknik kapasitesini artırmak. job_description: Role: Reservation Agent Location: Fraser Suites, Riyadh - Saudi ArabiaSalary: CompetitiveFrasers Hospitality is looking for an Reservation Agent To maximise all potential hotel revenues by working closely with the DOSM, Front Manager and the Reservations department. Gain a strong and comprehensive understanding of all market segments and the booking streams they come through. Be totally aware of all happenings that effect room night generation in the market place in terms of competitor activity and rate positioningWhat You Will Be Doing As An Reservation AgentProvides a full range of administrative, clerical and office support including, but not limited to:Work closely with the FOM and DOSM in rate setting for all periods. Collate all hotel reports relating to any reservation or sales tracking as designated by DOSM and GM. Ensure that this information is reviewed more analytically with the entire sales team and thus creating a culture of accountability and responsibility for all team members. Maintain overall responsibility of reservations however ensure Reservations Supervisor runs the day to day operations of dept Work closely with the FOM & Reservations Supervisor to manage the manning within the department in order to maximise sales and in accordance with the budgets. Maximise the productivity of the department through ongoing training and development programs; ensure mystery calls are conducted to monitor our sales and reservations conversion. Actively takes reservation enquiries when needed. Be involved in all yield and Revmax meetings as designated. Ensure minutes are followed up where issues are related to conversion of room night potential. Follow up on all Groups, Blocks, Allotments, and room list with Reservation Supervisor and Groups Co-ordinator. Liase with Credit Manager in relation to requests for Credit. Control the loading of all rates into Radisson’s harmony Database and hotels PMS. When appropriate train Reservations Supervisor to complete task. Ensure all complaints through HDBM are actioned within 24 hoursWhat We’re Looking ForYou have proven experience in a similar role with excellent communication and administration skills. You are an enthusiastic individual with a passion for attention to detail.Who are Frasers Hospitality?Conceived with the lifestyle preferences of today’s discerning travelers in mind, Frasers Hospitality has three award-winning branded serviced residences offerings – the Gold-Standard Fraser Suites, Fraser Place and Fraser Residence, as well as Modena by Fraser, a second-tier brand targeted at the road warrior and Capri by Fraser, a design-led hotel residence aimed at the Millennial business traveler.With 80% of our residents from Fortune 500 and Forbes-listed companies, Frasers’ intrinsic understanding of the importance of excellence in service and innovation in meeting the evolving needs of corporate travelers is reflective in the number of prestigious accolades garnered over the years.In addition to competitive rates of pay we also offer a range of great benefits.Interested?? Click Apply NowFrasers Hospitality, Malmaison & Hotel Du Vin are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age. job_description: La Barberie cherche son·sa nouvel·le adjoint·e administratif·ve/comptable. En mettant à contribution sa méthodologie et son sens de la débrouillardise, elle effectue les opérations reliées à la comptabilité de l’entreprise, notamment la tenue de livre, des comptes clients et des comptes fournisseurs.Tu feras partie d’une petite équipe de gestion motivée, très proactive, dans un environnement de travail plaisant avec des collègues présents·es et engagés·ées. la paie :Gérer la processus complet de la paie avec Employeur DResponsable des dossiers de CNESST, assurance collective, REER FondActionResponsable des différentes déclarations gouvernementales reliées à l'emploiResponsable de tous les suivis et dossiers en lien avec les ressources humaines et la paie (congés, vacances, etc.)Être un point de contact pour la clientèle et les partenaires :Accueillir avec bienveillance les visiteursRépondre aux appels/courriels et les adresser aux bonnes personnesAssurer la circulation de l’information aux bonnes personnes (coordination et suivi)Effectuer des tâches en appui aux départements et à la direction générale :Recevoir, trier et envoyer le courrierPrendre en charge les envois de colis (Dicom, Purolator, etc.) et apparier les coupons aux facturesEffectuer des tâches administratives sporadiques pour l’entreprisePrendre part à l’amélioration continue :Soulever à l’équipe de gestion toute problématique concernant les outils de travailDocumenter les processus et procéduresRepérer des opportunités d’amélioration de l’expérience visiteur et les soumettre à son gestionnaireQualificationsProfil et aptitudes :Dynamisme et positivismeJoueur d’équipe et grandes habiletés interpersonnellesDébrouillardise et autonomieRigueur et aisance à suivre des procédures et processusCapacité de gérer des clients difficilesExigences :DEC en administrationMaîtrise du logiciel comptable QuickbooksExpérience d'au moins 3 ans dans un poste similaireExcellente maîtrise du françaisMaîtrise professionnelle de l’anglaisMaîtrise des outils de bureautique de la suite OfficeExpérience à titre de point de contact clientèle/ventes (un atout)Conditions de travailPoste à temps plein entre 30h et 40h (à discuter)Horaire de travail flexible entre 8h et 18h du lundi au vendrediTravail en présentiel avec possibilité de télétravail après avoir acquis le niveau d’autonomie nécessaire.Salaire débutant à 23$/hAvantagesAssurance collective payée en partie par l'employeur (après 3 mois de service continu)Congés personnels payésHeures d’arrivée et de départ flexiblesRabais au pub et sur les produitsStationnement sur placeClub job_description: Akij Insaf Group is looking for Deputy Manager/Assistant Manager (Civil)-Internal AuditJob Description / ResponsibilityAkij Insaf is one of the leading names in the industrial sector of Bangladesh. It has been managing its overall business activities through 15000++ manpower including various levels of employees. The company are sincerely created an ideal safe working environment and dignified profession for all employees of the organization through practicing integrity, nurturing ability, sincerity, positive attitude, and fairness. Akij Insaf various industrial products have already managed to attract positive attention among customers across the country. The company is known for its diversified business portfolio, including Food, Textile, Printing & Packages, and Life style products. Now, we are seeking a dynamic & energetic person to join us as “Assistant Manager/Deputy Manager (Civil) - Internal Audit”.The candidate has to perform following responsibilities:1. Engineering & Technical AuditReview approved drawings, specifications, BOQs, and technical designs for civil and construction projects.Verify execution of works against approved plans, contract terms, and engineering standards.Conduct site inspections to assess construction quality, workmanship, and material usage.Identify deviations, defects, rework, and non-compliance with specifications.2. Cost & Quantity VerificationAudit measurement books (MB), running bills, and final bills of contractors.Verify quantities of work executed against BOQs and site measurements.Review variation orders, extra works, and rate analysis for reasonableness and approval compliance.Identify cost overruns, leakages, wastage, or inflated claims.3. Contract & Vendor ReviewReview construction contracts, work orders, and amendments for technical and commercial compliance.Assess contractor performance against contractual obligations (quality, timeline, safety).Review vendor selection, subcontracting, and compliance with procurement policies.4. Reporting & RecommendationsPrepare audit reports highlighting observations, risks, financial impact, and root causes.Provide practical and value-added recommendations for process improvement, cost control, and quality enhancement.Follow up on implementation of agreed audit recommendations.7. Coordination & Advisory RoleCoordinate with project teams, consultants, contractors, procurement, and finance departments.Act as a technical advisor to management on construction-related risks and controls.Support special investigations, management reviews, or forensic audits related to construction activities.Educational RequirementsBachelor of Science (BSc) in Civil EngineeringBachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering.Professional certifications (PMP, PRINCE2, RICS, or similar) will be an advantage.Experience Requirements5 to 10 year(s)The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s):Group of CompaniesAdditional Requirements5–10 years of experience in civil/construction engineering, project management, or engineering audit.Hands-on experience in building, infrastructure, industrial, or real estate projects.Prior exposure to engineering audit, internal audit, or cost control will be highly preferred.Strong knowledge of construction methods, BOQs, estimation, billing, and contracts.Ability to read and interpret engineering drawings and specifications.Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail.Knowledge of ERP systems, MS Excel, AutoCAD, and project management tools.Strong communication and report-writing skills.High integrity, independence, and professional skepticism.Work Location: Head Office with frequent site visits across Group company locations.

job_description: Galderma is the emerging pure-play dermatology category leader, present in approximately 90 countries. We deliver an innovative, science-based portfolio of premium flagship brands and services that span the full spectrum of the fast-growing dermatology market through Injectable Aesthetics, Dermatological Skincare and Therapeutic Dermatology. Since our foundation in 1981, we have dedicated our focus and passion to the human body's largest organ - the skin - meeting individual consumer and patient needs with superior outcomes in partnership with healthcare professionals. Because we understand that the skin, we are in shapes our lives, we are advancing dermatology for every skin story.We look for people who focus on getting results, embrace learning and bring a positive energy. They must combine initiative with a sense of teamwork and collaboration. Above all, they must be passionate about doing something meaningful for consumers, patients, and the healthcare professionals we serve every day. We aim to empower each employee and promote their personal growth while ensuring business needs are met now and into the future. Across our company, we embrace diversity and respect the dignity, privacy, and personal rights of every employee.At Galderma, we actively give our teams reasons to believe in our bold ambition to become the leading dermatology company in the world. improve existing controls, and ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.The role also includes supporting and training offshore team members while maintaining strong integration with the local finance team.ResponsibilitiesAccounting & Financial ClosePrepare and post journal entries and reconcile general ledger accounts on a timely basis.Assist in month-end close activities, including preparation of schedules, reconciliations, and supporting documentation.Reconcile accounts payable and accounts receivable balances and investigate variances.Distributor Claims Management (Key Responsibility)Take full ownership of the distributor claims validation process within a complex business model.Review, validate, and assess incoming distributor claims for accuracy, completeness, and compliance with contractual and accounting requirements.Apply sound accounting and reporting principles to determine and book appropriate accruals.Continuously monitor claims versus accruals, investigate variances, and ensure timely true-ups.Act as the primary point of accountability for all distributor claims, providing clear and timely updates to both finance and the wider business.Communicate effectively with internal stakeholders and external distributors, taking initiative to resolve issues based on information obtained.Identify weaknesses in the current claims process and proactively drive improvements to increase efficiency, accuracy, and control.Controls, Compliance & AuditEnsure adherence to company policies, procedures, and internal control requirements in daily operations.Provide audit support by gathering documentation and supporting GICFR testing.Contribute to the preparation of schedules and documentation for internal and external audits.Payments & Reporting SupportReview statements of account (SOAs) and validate payment runs for accuracy and completeness prior to release.Collaborate with other departments to obtain data required for financial reporting and analysis.Process Improvement & CollaborationProactively identify opportunities to improve accounting processes, controls, and ways of working, and support implementation of enhancements.Work effectively with offshore/shared service teams, including providing guidance, training, and oversight where required.Integrate seamlessly into the local finance team, contributing to a collaborative and high-performing environment.Actively seek clarification and guidance when needed, demonstrating ownership and accountability for outcomes.DevelopmentParticipate in training and development activities to continuously enhance accounting, reporting, and business knowledge.Skills & QualificationsBachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance, or related field.Professional accounting qualification such as ACCA, ACA, CPA, or equivalent is preferred.Solid understanding of accounting and financial reporting principles (IFRS knowledge strongly preferred).3–6 years of relevant Maintains a safe, clean environment using approved infection control practices. Implementing the daily clerical planning at the assigned ward level. Maintain ward-related records and databases as directed by the department manager. job_title: Sr. Officer/ Asst. Manager- Billing & Receivable - (For Ensure Support Services Ltd.) - Job ID - 1457284
Key Account Manager (KAM) - For Divergent Technologies Limited - Job ID: 1458723

job_description: Job SummaryThe Assistant Finance Manager will support the Finance Manager in overseeing the banks financial operations, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and efficiency across accounting, reporting, taxation, and banking-related activities. The role requires strong hands-on experience in VAT filing, monthly financial reporting, vendor payment management, MIS reporting, and active involvement in core banking system implementation and enhancement initiative.Key ResponsibilitiesFinancial Accounting & Reporting Assist in the preparation and review of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements in accordance with applicable accounting standards. Ensure timely month-end and year-end closing, including accruals, provisions, and reconciliations. Monitor general ledger activities and ensure accuracy of accounting records. Support internal and external audits by preparing schedules, explanations, and documentation.VAT & Tax Compliance Prepare, review, and submit VAT returns accurately and on time in compliance with local tax regulations. Maintain VAT records, reconciliations, and supporting documentation. Coordinate with tax consultants and authorities on VAT-related matters, assessments, and audits. Assist with other statutory tax filings and regulatory compliance as required.Vendor Payments & Accounts Payable Oversee and manage the vendor payment cycle, ensuring timely and accurate payments. Review supplier invoices for accuracy, approvals, and compliance with contractual terms.Maintain vendors master data and resolve discrepancies or disputes with suppliers. Monitor aging reports and manage cash flow related to payables.MIS & Management Reporting Prepare and analyze MIS reports for management, including profitability, cost analysis, budget vs. actuals, and variance analysis. Develop dashboards and periodic financial summaries to support strategic decision-making. Ensure accuracy, consistency, and timeliness of management reports.Budgeting & Forecasting Assist in the preparation of annual budgets and financial forecasts. Track budget performance and highlight deviations with actionable insights. Support cost control initiatives and financial planning activities.Core Banking System Implementation & Support Actively participate in the implementation, enhancement, and optimization of the core banking system. Coordinate with IT, vendors, and internal stakeholders during system rollout and upgrades. Assist in mapping financial processes, testing system functionalities, and validating financial data. Ensure seamless integration between the core banking system and accounting/reporting modules. Provide post-implementation support, troubleshooting, and documentation.Controls & Process Improvement Ensure adherence to internal financial controls, policies, and procedures. Identify process gaps and recommend improvements to enhance efficiency and compliance. Support automation and digital transformation initiatives within the finance function.EDUCATION AND CERTIFICATIONSBachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.RequirementsMinimum of 5 years' experience in trade finance operations within a banking environment.Strong knowledge of bookkeeping principles, general ledger functions, and financial reporting.Strong knowledge with IFRS16Familiarity with local tax regulations (NBR), payment processing standards, and internal controlsFamiliarity with Central Bank of Bahrain guidelinesFamiliarity with TCS core system is an advantage

job_description: Bengal Airlift Ltd. is looking for Executive / Sr. Executive- Finance & AccountsJob Description / ResponsibilityFitsAir, Sri Lanka’s first private airline founded in 1997, has been connecting travelers across South Asia and beyond with its hub in Colombo. Today, the airline proudly operates flights to Dhaka, Dubai, Chennai, and Kuala Lumpur, offering seamless connectivity and trusted service. Expanding its wings further, FitsAir launched the Dhaka–Colombo route in April 2024, opening new horizons for Bangladeshi travelers.In Bangladesh, Bengal Airlift Limited serves as the General Sales Agent (GSA), representing FitsAir with passion and professionalism. Together, we carry the inspiring tagline “Friends in the Skies”—a promise of comfort, reliability, and friendship in every journey.This position is responsible for managing the financial affairs of the organization by maintaining accurate records, ensuring compliance with financial regulations.
